case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE LUIS ORDONEZ LINO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED MAR-21-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORDONEZ LINO, JOSE LUIS
